# FlowForge Brand Brief

Use this only for compact brand context. Current campaign copy and placement are controlled by latest_update.md and platform_specs.txt.

- Brand tone: calm, focused, modern SaaS, product-led.
- Current colors: ink deep `#0F2D2E`, cream canvas `#F7F3E8`, amber focus `#FFB703`, sage panel `#A8C7B5`, white text.
- Current logo: horizontal wordmark or folded-path mark, never bottom-centered.
- Current visual language: planning-board UI, cards, columns, weekly lanes, and a focused state.
- Archive material used square social dimensions, purple automation gradients, lightning automation heroes, and `Automate Everything`; these are not current campaign content.
